title: Bingus and the Boys
description: A pack including Cobblemon and its complimentary addons with just a hint of tech.
body:
This modpack is designed primarily around Cobblemon. It contains a lot of complimentary mods/addons to Cobblemon as well as a variety of performance and optimisation mods. Additionally, there are a couple of tech mods that are subject to change between versions. As of 1.0.0, the main tech mods are Applied Energistics 2 and Powah!.

This pack can and will break accross versions. Be careful if using on a production server.

Also note, this is the client pack. A server pack may be released at a later date.
